scripts.export:openapi: curl -sf http://localhost:3000/api-json | npx prettier --parser json > openapi.json
scripts.generate: [ -f openapi.json ] && kubb generate && pnpm generate:fix-schemas || echo 'skipped: openapi.json not found (run pnpm sync:api-client)'
scripts.generate:fix-schemas:
echo '// TODO: remove when OpenAPI spec empty $refs (#/components/schemas/) are fixed in backend
export type Schemas = string;' > src/gen/models/Schemas.ts
